asset_name: Star Wars B1 Battle Droid Low Poly
author: PolyPizza (Community Model)
usage_notes: Low-poly B1 battle droid suitable for Clone Wars mod. Tan/brown metallic color scheme matches Separatist droid forces. Compatible with TABS-style infantry unit model aesthetic.
special_notes: Cylindrical body with long thin limbs - iconic B1 silhouette
Low poly count optimized for infantry unit layer
Tan/brown colors match Trade Federation/Separatist aesthetic
No skeleton rig - suitable for static placement

steps: Click the Download button (requires free Sketchfab account)
Select GLB format (recommended for Unity import)
Save as source_download.glb in this directory
Run: dotnet run --project src/Tools/PackCompiler -- ingest assets raw/sw_b1_droid_sketchfab_001

asset_manifest.json.description: This file - metadata and provenance record

discovery_notes: Discovered via Sketchfab search: 'B1 battle droid low poly'
Score: 9.2/10 - Excellent polycount, clear silhouette, CC-BY license
Alternative candidates: sw_b1_droid_sketchfab_002 (7.5k poly), sw_b1_droid_sketchfab_003 (8.2k poly)
